$schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Email Engine pipeline. Cloned in shape from universal-sops/presentation-slide-craft/PIPELINE-MANIFEST.json. The deterministic orchestrator run_email_engine.py walks these phases in order (P1->P2->P3->P4) with NO phase skips. Each phase declares its produces_artifact, its _chk_* preflight symbol(s), and its AF-* gate codes. Every AF-EMAIL-* code below is enforced by tools/prove-email.py (a fail-closed, model-free, stdlib-only measurer); py_symbol names the function that decides it. Editing this file is step (i) of any Email Engine change: add the gate, add the AF code here with its trigger, add the checker, add the self-test fixture.
design_law: Enforcement, not description. Bands are the DEFAULT floor; a logged client-exact override wins and is recorded on the process certificate. Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own provider chain — NEVER Anthropic/claude-* ids or operator keys. The deterministic gates are provider-neutral Python that run identically everywhere.

phases.name: Select (intake brief -> framework / buyer-type / objective / sequence)

preflight.label: locked brief (working/copy/brief.json from the ONE-block turn-gated ledger; skill==email-engine; asked_all_at_once:true; all six brief fields present; a self-attested completeness flag is NEVER trusted). AF-EMAIL-TYPE-MISMATCH / AF-EMAIL-INTAKE-SPLIT / AF-EMAIL-BRIEF-INCOMPLETE.

additional_preflights.label: selection resolved (email_matcher.py routes the brief to a valid framework/buyer-type/objective/sequence; matched ids are canonical). AF-EMAIL-FRAMEWORK-UNKNOWN / AF-EMAIL-OBJECTIVE-INVALID / AF-EMAIL-PERSONA-INVALID.

phases.name: Generate (author corpus-faithful copy against the selected structures)

preflight.label: emails.json authored (every slot carries subjects[2], previews, body, framework, objective, ctas[]; a supplied sections[] matches the framework's declared part count). AF-EMAIL-FRAMEWORK-INCOMPLETE.

phases.name: QC (fail-closed floor prover over the authored copy)

preflight.label: prove-email.py PASS (exit 0) over working/copy/emails.json — enforces the full SACRED battery. ANY AF-EMAIL-* violation blocks advance to P4.

phases.name: Deploy (DRAFT-ONLY Skill-44 build plan; human approval before any send)

preflight.label: signed process certificate + explicit human approval; the emitted GHL workflow is a DRAFT. Nothing sends. A hand-rolled sender in the run dir is refused. AF-PROCESS-INTEGRITY / AF-EMAIL-DEPLOY-UNAPPROVED / AF-EMAIL-SEND-BYPASS.

autofails.trigger: framework is not one of the 13 canonical framework ids
a supplied sections[] does not match the framework's declared part count (e.g. PASTOR needs 6, Million-Dollar-Sales 12)
in a 12-email sequence a slot's framework or buyer_type does not match the buyer-type -> email# -> framework map, or an invalid buyer_type
in the 10-email landing-page sequence a slot's framework does not match the landing-page map
landing-page != 10 emails / high-ticket|buyer-type != 12 emails, or e_slot values are not the contiguous set 1..N
objective is not exactly one of promotional|abandoned-cart|upsell|downsell
persona_style is set but is not one of the 12 canonical styles
a persona person's name is present in the copy (styles adopt tone/rhetoric only; the person is NEVER named or quoted)
not exactly two non-empty A/B subject lines
preview count != the sequence's declared count (Convert&Flow master=1 / high-ticket=2)
body outside 150-300 words (or outside a logged client-exact override); the 3-B Plan must be < 150
fewer than 1 CTA (or fewer than 3 for the landing-page PASTOR emails E1-3)
Convert&Flow subject outside 8-12 words or contains a pricing token / high-ticket subject outside 80-87 rendered chars or not exactly one emoji
{{contact.first_name}} not placed in a subject (first 40 chars for Convert&Flow; present for high-ticket)
more than 4 emojis in the body, or a paragraph runs more than 3 sentences without a break
a placeholder signature token is present, or the founder's actual name is absent from the close
a high-ticket appointment email carries no disruptive element
deploy requested without a signed process certificate (signed:true + signed_by), or a phase was skipped
brief skill != email-engine, or an unknown sequence_position/type
the intake questions were not delivered in ONE block (asked_all_at_once not true / one_question_per_turn true / multiple block ids)
any of the six required brief fields missing/empty, or an invalid objective value
deploy attempted without explicit logged human approval (the emitted GHL workflow is DRAFT-ONLY; nothing sends without approval)
a hand-rolled email sender is present in the run directory (a direct GHL/SMTP send outside the sanctioned draft-only handoff)
